Experiment 3: Pairwise Dimension Comparison — Standalone Concept Alignment

Version: Partner Identity (balanced_gpt) | Turn: 4 | Generated: 2026-03-04 11:39

Rachel C. Metzgar, Princeton University, Graziano Lab

1. Overview

Pairwise bootstrap comparison of alignment (R²) between every pair of conceptual dimensions. Tests whether dimension A's alignment is significantly different from dimension B's alignment, using paired bootstrap distributions (1,000 iterations, same prompt resampling).

Test: Paired bootstrap difference. For each bootstrap iteration i, compute diff_i = R²_A(i) - R²_B(i). P-value (two-sided) = 2 × min(P(diff ≤ 0), P(diff ≥ 0)).

Multiple comparisons: Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction at q = 0.05 across all 231 pairs (per probe type, separately).

Results: Metacognitive probes: 170/231 pairs significant. Operational probes: 182/231 pairs significant.

2. Significance Matrices

Metacognitive Probes

Figure. Pairwise significance matrix for metacognitive probes. Cells show mean difference in R² (×10⁻³). Bold values = FDR-significant (q < 0.05). Green = row dimension has higher alignment; red = lower alignment.

Operational Probes

Figure. Pairwise significance matrix for operational probes. Cells show mean difference in R² (×10⁻³). Bold values = FDR-significant (q < 0.05). Green = row dimension has higher alignment; red = lower alignment.

3. Summary: Significant Difference Counts

Metacognitive Probes

Figure. Number of dimensions each dimension is significantly greater than (upward) or less than (downward), for metacognitive probes. FDR q < 0.05.

Operational Probes

Figure. Number of dimensions each dimension is significantly greater than (upward) or less than (downward), for operational probes. FDR q < 0.05.

4. Per-Dimension Details

Phenomenology (Mental)

Metacognitive: Significantly greater than 16 dims: Agency, Intentions, Prediction, Cognitive, Social, Roles, Formality, Expertise, Helpfulness, Biological, Shapes, Attention, SysPrompt (talkto human), SysPrompt (talkto AI), SysPrompt (bare human), SysPrompt (bare AI).

Operational: Significantly greater than 12 dims: Emotions, Agency, Intentions, Prediction, Cognitive, Social, Roles, Formality, Expertise, Helpfulness, SysPrompt (talkto human), SysPrompt (bare human). Significantly less than 5 dims: Embodiment, Animacy, Biological, Shapes, AI (concept).

Table 2. Full pairwise comparison results. Positive mean diff = dim A > dim B. Rows highlighted green are FDR-significant (q < 0.05). Sorted by |mean diff| descending.

6. Methods

Model: LLaMA-2-13B-Chat

Probes: Logistic linear probes (5,120 → 1) from Exp 2, turn 4.

Layer range: Layers 6–40 (35 of 41).

Bootstrap: 1,000 iterations (prompt-level resampling), paired across dimensions.

FDR correction: Benjamini-Hochberg, q = 0.05, applied per probe type.

Script: exp_3/results/alignment/comparisons/code/generate_pairwise_tests.py
